case_id: National PUI attribute for Person entity type

pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json. Name is synthetic/task-specific but follows DHIS2 naming conventions for tracked entity attributes.

pi_items.verified_value: Person is a standard Tracked Entity Type in DHIS2
pi_items.source: DHIS2 documentation confirms Person is the most common tracked entity instance type (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/implement/database-design/tracker-system-design/defining-the-tracked-entity.html). Person is used in DHIS2 Tracker for tracking individuals enrolled in health programs.
Regex analysis: BO (2 uppercase) + / (slash) + 123456 (6 digits) conforms to requirement 'Two Uppercase Letters, a forward slash, and Six Digits'
Regex analysis: WA (2 uppercase) + / (slash) + 999999 (6 digits) conforms to requirement 'Two Uppercase Letters, a forward slash, and Six Digits'
Regex analysis: AB (2 uppercase) + / (slash) + 000000 (6 digits) conforms to requirement 'Two Uppercase Letters, a forward slash, and Six Digits'
Regex analysis: 'bo' contains lowercase letters, not uppercase. Correctly identified as invalid for pattern enforcing 'Two Uppercase Letters'
Regex analysis: Uses hyphen (-) instead of forward slash (/). Correctly identified as invalid for pattern requiring forward slash
Regex analysis: Contains only 5 digits instead of required 6. Correctly identified as invalid for pattern requiring 'Six Digits'
Regex analysis: No uppercase letters or forward slash. Correctly identified as invalid for pattern requiring 'Two Uppercase Letters, a forward slash, and Six Digits'

pi_items.verified_value: Does not match pattern [A-Z]{2}/[0-9]{6} (7 digits instead of 6)
pi_items.source: Regex analysis with anchors: Pattern [A-Z]{2}/[0-9]{6}$ rejects BO/1234567 because it has 7 digits. However, without anchors, Python regex.match() matches only the first 6 digits. Verifier code uses regex.match() which creates ambiguity. This test case is ONLY correct if the pattern includes anchors (^[A-Z]{2}/[0-9]{6}$) or DHIS2 uses full-string matching semantics.

privileged_info_summary: Task requires configuring a Tracked Entity Attribute named 'National PUI' with a regex pattern 'Two Uppercase Letters, a forward slash, and Six Digits' (e.g., BO/123456) for the Person entity type in DHIS2. Person is a real, standard Tracked Entity Type in DHIS2 used for individual tracking. Test cases are logically correct but contain a critical issue: the test case 'BO/1234567' (7 digits) is marked as invalid, but verifier code uses regex.match() which accepts partial matches. This case would only properly fail if the pattern is configured with anchors (^[A-Z]{2}/[0-9]{6}$) or if DHIS2 uses full-string matching. The pattern requirement strongly suggests full matching should be enforced ('enforce the format'), making anchors necessary. All data is synthetic (task-specific configuration, not real system data).
